tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mild hypoglycemia, elevated chloride, high LDL cholesterol, and low HDL cholesterol. Renal function and microalbumin/creatinine ratio are normal. The lipid profile indicates increased cardiovascular risk. No evidence of significant renal impairment or diabetes. Recommend clinical correlation for hypoglycemia and consideration of lipid-lowering therapy.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
